4331822.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1300
4331822.transcript: Literally, not even I could spot you.

18598895.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_C
18598895.transcript: We've got this! Just a little more!

28943466.label: PL0100_vo_MOV_wait_cold_2
28943466.transcript: Who... who turned down the heat?

53338866.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0400
53338866.transcript: The mana is strong with this one.

64108550.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_3_FIRST
64108550.transcript: Well, I think its attitude got worse!

76684618.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_FIRST
76684618.transcript: This city doesn't belong to you!

83317163.label: PL0100_vo_ETC_quest_clear_4
83317163.transcript: Good work! Now let's get back out there!

89501299.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_B
89501299.transcript: That catalyst thing better be near.

101313402.label: PL0100_vo_ETC_quest_clear_1
101313402.transcript: We did it! And we did it together!

117826520.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1400
117826520.transcript: Never fear, sky citizens! Your hero is here!

118266757.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
118266757.transcript: Furikin! We beat you once, we'll do it again!

124345905.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0700
124345905.transcript: What would I do without ya?

163634063.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1200
163634063.transcript: I wanna be like her when I grow up.

186844787.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_C
186844787.transcript: We've come too far to back down now!

212133678.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_weakpoint
212133678.transcript: Hehe, I knew that it would!

226034174.label: PL0100_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_PL0200
226034174.transcript: Whew! What would I do without you?

276676672.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_5st_1_FIRST
276676672.transcript: Lilith! Let Lyria go! Or else!

284952362.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_overdrive
284952362.transcript: Guess we can't go soft on 'em!

347112600.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_1_FIRST
347112600.transcript: Let's get to the monastery quick!

364066584.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_A
364066584.transcript: We don't have time to mess around!

387606511.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
387606511.transcript: We won't stop until you're free!

392402110.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
392402110.transcript: Man, the sky realm is huge!

427901340.label: PL0100_vo_ETC_quest_clear_2
427901340.transcript: That worked out? Just like always.

464158959.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_FIRST
464158959.transcript: Fear won't ever hold us back!

474552158.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_1
474552158.transcript: Come on, guys! The fun's just getting started!

475080463.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_C
475080463.transcript: We won't lose to these clowns!

477414413.label: PL0100_vo_CMM_emo_win_3
477414413.transcript: Hah! As if we'd ever lose!

482339939.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_3
482339939.transcript: Keep your heads in the game!

496549710.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_B
496549710.transcript: Our crew fights for what's right!

498665716.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_FIRST
498665716.transcript: We can't let Galons outdo us!

507331760.label: PL0100_vo_CMM_emo_win_1
507331760.transcript: Chalk one up for the good guys!

553807696.label: PL0100_vo_CMM_emo_win_6
553807696.transcript: No sweat! We can do this all day!

563659840.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1700
563659840.transcript: Then I'll be right behind you!

566180286.label: PL0100_vo_CMM_emo_pose_2
566180286.transcript: Hehe, the fun's just getting started!

579608429.label: PL0100_vo_DUO_rescue1_A_3
579608429.transcript: Don't give up on me now!

602304068.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1500
602304068.transcript: Uh, can I get back to you later?

603157136.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_B
603157136.transcript: Okay, Id! You asked for it!

622880815.label: PL0100_vo_ETC_quest_clear_6
622880815.transcript: To the end of the skies! To Estalucia!

626457440.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1200
626457440.transcript: Score one for the Holy Knights!

626911493.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1300
626911493.transcript: I can't believe I kept up!

630692716.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_C
630692716.transcript: You've held us back long enough!

640969113.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_B
640969113.transcript: Concentrate and we can win this!

647818165.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_B
647818165.transcript: Victory is ours for the taking!

674560471.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_break
674560471.transcript: Took the words right out of my mouth!

694780031.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_A
694780031.transcript: It's all on us, team! Let's go!

696569290.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_C
696569290.transcript: We'll protect this world! That's a promise!

696670459.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1000
696670459.transcript: I've been working on my technique.

701024616.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0300
701024616.transcript: Who do you take me for?

702530703.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1600
702530703.transcript: With you around, we can handle anything!

708717120.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_2_FIRST
708717120.transcript: Those swords are killer! Cover each other's backs!

722972660.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_rampage
722972660.transcript: Yep! And I do it again!

755106470.label: PL0100_vo_ETC_comeback_1
755106470.transcript: This is no time to rest!

762042521.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_1st_C
762042521.transcript: What can we do against him?

766853203.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_3
766853203.transcript: This is why we're the best!

874623023.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1300
874623023.transcript: I'm not a toddler, you know.

875781112.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_1st_1_FIRST
875781112.transcript: We've beat wind primals before. We can do it again!

886658087.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0800
886658087.transcript: Come on! How often have you saved my hide?

896091919.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_A
896091919.transcript: Work together and we'll make it through!

1043923814.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1900
1043923814.transcript: We'll get you to smile someday!

1045919515.label: PL0100_vo_ETC_quest_start_3
1045919515.transcript: Yeah! Let's do it to it!

1053811023.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0000
1053811023.transcript: You're already that and more, Lyria!

1055498776.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0200
1055498776.transcript: There's more where that came from!

15072942.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2400
15072942.transcript: Glad to have you with us, Gallanza!

114369200.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1700
114369200.transcript: It's easy when we're all on the same page!

146623744.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2800
146623744.transcript: No one does it like us!

158970131.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2900
158970131.transcript: There's more where that came from!

294206585.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1200
294206585.transcript: I was just thinking the same thing!

312689348.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2500
312689348.transcript: I knew you wouldn't let me down!

338087644.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2100
338087644.transcript: That's why they call you supreme!

391262415.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1300
391262415.transcript: How many cuts was that? Lost count around ten.

487863052.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1900
487863052.transcript: There's no shame in asking for help!

504224723.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2300
504224723.transcript: I have gone extra rounds with Sir Baggins.

505459515.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1200
505459515.transcript: Still one of the coolest attacks I've ever seen!

523292388.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1100
523292388.transcript: Got him on the back foot!

605834088.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1500
605834088.transcript: Amazing! Oh, he really is a legend!

637459645.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2500
637459645.transcript: I don't just trust you, I believe in you!

675495533.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0800
675495533.transcript: The way you throw that ice around... it was beautiful.

762065621.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2800
762065621.transcript: Couldn't do it without you, Frau!

775196681.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2200
775196681.transcript: Let's hope it doesn't come to that.

816878324.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1100
816878324.transcript: Not as good as you, Siegfried!

880196391.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2700
880196391.transcript: Thanks, but I know my limits.

897930528.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0400
897930528.transcript: You've gotten real good at spell-slinging, Io!

940255470.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2600
940255470.transcript: Mind joining me for the next one too?

984274922.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2900
984274922.transcript: You keep it up too, Fediel!

989679335.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0700
989679335.transcript: A little training goes a long way!

1048613923.label: PL0100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0800
1048613923.transcript: Plenty more where that came from!

143794557.label: PL0100_vo_CMM_emo_boxing_1
143794557.transcript: Time for you to throw in the towel!

148358892.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2100
148358892.transcript: I'll hit 'em even harder next time!

7199215.label: PL0100_vo_CMM_emo_abs_1
7199215.transcript: Here goes... one... two... three... four... five... six.

90668862.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2300
90668862.transcript: Hehe, I could say the same to you!

110278338.label: PL0100_vo_CMM_emo_pushup_3
110278338.transcript: Just... a little... more... Got through it.

121742739.label: PL0100_vo_CMM_emo_pushup_2
121742739.transcript: Okay. Oh yeah! Feel the burn! One more! Not bad!

196661269.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2200
196661269.transcript: You've always got our backs, Sylvain!

239315150.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2300
239315150.transcript: Yeah! I've always got your back!

374884222.label: PL0100_vo_CMM_emo_abs_3
374884222.transcript: Let's do this. Okay. Never... And... Done. Sweet!

452070098.label: PL0100_vo_CMM_emo_squat_3
452070098.transcript: Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah!

474393345.label: PL0100_vo_CMM_emo_pushup_1
474393345.transcript: One... two... three... four... five... six.

524198090.label: PL0100_vo_CMM_emo_abs_2
524198090.transcript: Okay... I got this... Last one...

640807952.label: PL0100_vo_CMM_emo_squat_1
640807952.transcript: One, two, three, four, five, six.

759271418.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2300
759271418.transcript: Oh man, you make our lives so easy!

781472867.label: PL0100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2200
781472867.transcript: Wow, I wish I could do that!

412424186.label: PL0100_vo_CMM_emo_onigiri_3
412424186.transcript: Don't mind if I do! So good!
